title: Judge temporarily blocks Trump's $1.8 billion 'weaponization' fund
summary: A federal judge issued a temporary injunction blocking Trump's administration from establishing a $1.8 billion compensation fund for alleged victims of government "weaponization." The ruling halts a controversial initiative that critics argue lacks clear legal authority.
content: A U.S. judge on Friday temporarily blocked President Donald Trump's administration from setting up a nearly $1.8 billion fund to compensate victims of what Trump has called government "weaponization."

zh.title: 法官临时阻止特朗普18亿美元"武器化"基金
zh.summary: 联邦法官发布临时禁制令，阻止特朗普政府建立一个18亿美元的补偿基金，用于补偿政府"武器化"的受害者。该裁决暂停了一项引发争议的举措，批评人士认为该举措缺乏明确的法律依据。

title: Jim Cramer says Dell’s blowout quarter sets up a crucial week for AI stocks
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer highlighted Dell Technologies' blockbuster quarterly results as a catalyst for renewed momentum in AI and data center stocks. Dell's strong earnings have reignited investor enthusiasm for artificial intelligence infrastructure plays. The timing could prove pivotal for technology investors focused on the AI sector.
content: CNBC’s Jim Cramer said Dell Technologies’ blockbuster quarter reignited enthusiasm around AI and data center stocks.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默表示戴尔出色季度业绩为AI股票关键一周做准备
zh.summary: CNBC的吉姆·克莱默将戴尔科技公司的出色季度业绩强调为AI和数据中心股票获得新动力的催化剂。戴尔强劲的收益重新点燃了投资者对人工智能基础设施投资的热情。这一时机可能对关注AI领域的科技投资者至关重要。

title: A mystery man tried to buy Playboy’s high-end lingerie business. It turned out to all be a scam.
summary: An attempt to acquire Playboy's luxury lingerie brand Honey Birdette turned out to be an elaborate fraud scheme. Kevin Juin, the would-be buyer, allegedly misappropriated acquisition funds for personal luxury purchases including watches, jewelry, and private club memberships. Prosecutors are investigating the criminal scheme.
content: Prosecutors say Kevin Juin used money he raised to buy the company Honey Birdette to purchase luxury watches, jewelry, private-club memberships and OnlyFans subscriptions.

zh.title: 一神秘人士试图收购花花公子高端内衣业务，结果却是一场骗局
zh.summary: 收购花花公子奢侈内衣品牌蜂鸟的尝试被证实是一场精心策划的欺诈计划。潜在买家凯文·朱因据称挪用收购资金用于个人奢侈品购买，包括手表、珠宝和私人俱乐部会员。检察官正在调查这起犯罪计划。

title: Gap and American Eagle shares both get crushed — and neither retailer is blaming the economy
summary: Shares of Gap and American Eagle Outfitters declined sharply despite disappointing earnings from both retailers. However, executives at both companies insisted that economic weakness was not responsible for their performance struggles. The mismatch between investor concerns and management commentary suggests deeper confidence issues.
content: Despite earnings that underwhelmed investors, executives at both Gap and American Eagle Outfitters said nothing is wrong with the economy.

zh.title: Gap和美鹰股价暴跌，两家零售商均否认经济衰退是主因
zh.summary: 尽管业绩令人失望，Gap和American Eagle Outfitters的股价仍大幅下跌。然而，两家公司的高管都坚持经济疲软并非其业绩困难的原因。投资者担忧与管理层评论之间的不匹配表明存在更深层的信心危机。

title: Oil slides, stocks climb as Trump puts off determination on Iran proposal
summary: Oil prices fell while stock markets gained following a White House meeting where President Trump postponed announcing a final decision on an Iran proposal. The delay created mixed market signals regarding U.S.-Iran relations and energy policy. Markets remain uncertain about the timing and terms of any potential agreement.
content: A White House meeting Friday ended without a decision by the U.S. president.

zh.title: 特朗普推迟伊朗提案决定，油价下跌股市上升
zh.summary: 在白宫会议后，特朗普总统推迟公布对伊朗提案的最终决定，导致油价下跌而股市上升。这一延迟在美伊关系和能源政策方面释放了混合信号。市场对任何潜在协议的时间表和条款仍然不确定。

title: ServiceNow’s stock soars to a historic month as AI fears fade across software
summary: ServiceNow shares surged over 40% this month, leading a broader recovery in enterprise software stocks as investor fears about AI disruption have eased. The rally reflects renewed confidence in established software companies' ability to incorporate artificial intelligence. ServiceNow's strength signals a significant sentiment shift toward legacy software leaders.
content: ServiceNow shares gained over 40% this month, leading an industrywide relief rally among enterprise software companies.

zh.title: ServiceNow股价创历史高位，软件行业AI恐慌消退
zh.summary: ServiceNow股价本月飙升超过40%，领导企业软件股票的更广泛复苏，因为投资者对AI颠覆的恐惧已消退。这波涨势反映了市场对传统软件公司整合人工智能能力的重新信心。ServiceNow的强劲表现标志着对遗留软件领导者的情绪发生了重大转变。

title: Software stocks wrap up best month since 2001 as talk of 'SaaSpocalypse' subsides
summary: Software stocks posted their best monthly performance since 2001, as industry concerns about an AI-driven collapse have largely disappeared. Companies including Snowflake and Okta achieved record gains this week on investor optimism about their AI strategies. The rally represents a dramatic reversal in how markets value enterprise software firms.
content: Snowflake and Okta both saw record stock pops this week as investors found favor in their AI software strategies.

zh.title: 软件股票迎来自2001年以来最佳月度表现，"SaaS末日"议论消退
zh.summary: 软件股票取得自2001年以来最佳月度表现，因为业界对AI驱动崩溃的担忧已大幅消退。包括Snowflake和Okta在内的公司本周因投资者对其AI战略的乐观态度而实现创纪录涨幅。这一涨势代表了市场对企业软件公司估值方式的戏剧性转变。

title: Trump ends Iran meeting without announcing ‘final determination’ on deal
summary: President Trump concluded a White House meeting on an Iran deal without announcing a final determination, leaving the negotiation status unclear. His Truth Social statement contained ambiguous language about which of his conditions are already part of the ongoing agreement. The lack of clarity perpetuates uncertainty around U.S.-Iran diplomacy.
content: Trump's Truth Social statement left unclear which of his conditions are already part of a deal that negotiators are working on to pause the U.S.-Iran war.

zh.title: 特朗普结束伊朗会议，未宣布对协议的"最终决定"
zh.summary: 总统特朗普在白宫关于伊朗协议的会议结束时，未宣布最终决定，使谈判状态不明确。他在Truth Social上的声明对其哪些条件已是正在进行的协议的一部分使用了含糊的措辞。缺乏明确性加剧了美国-伊朗外交的不确定性。

title: Here’s the real story behind the record drop in America’s oil reserves
summary: America's Strategic Petroleum Reserve has fallen to its lowest level in more than 40 years, representing a historic drawdown. Experts contend that despite the record decline, the implications for the economy may be less severe than anticipated. The reserve depletion reflects complex energy policy decisions and market dynamics.
content: Stocks in the nation’s Strategic Petroleum Reserve are near their lowest in more than 40 years — but it may not matter

zh.title: 美国石油储备创纪录下降背后的真实故事
zh.summary: 美国战略石油储备已跌至40多年来的最低水平，代表历史性的大幅下调。专家认为，尽管储备下降创纪录，但对经济的影响可能不如预期严重。储备耗尽反映了复杂的能源政策决策和市场动态。

title: These S&P 500 stocks soared the most during the AI-driven May rally
summary: S&P 500 stocks achieved substantial gains during May's AI-focused market rally, with particular strength in the previously beleaguered software sector. The broad-based recovery demonstrated renewed investor confidence in artificial intelligence-exposed companies. Software stocks, despite facing recent headwinds, led the market gains.
content: Even stocks in the beleaguered software industry have been on fire.

zh.title: 这些标普500指数股票在人工智能驱动的五月反弹中涨幅最大
zh.summary: 标普500指数股票在五月以人工智能为重点的市场反弹中获得了显著增长，特别是在之前受困的软件部门表现强劲。这一广泛的复苏表明投资者对人工智能相关公司的信心重燃。软件股尽管面临最近的逆风，但领导了市场涨幅。

title: IRS unveils new health savings account limits for 2027
summary: The IRS has announced increased contribution limits for health savings accounts taking effect in 2027. The new limits provide greater flexibility for taxpayers managing healthcare expenses and savings. The adjustments reflect inflation and evolving healthcare financing needs.
content: The IRS has increased the health savings account limits for 2027. Here's what you need to know.

zh.title: 美国国税局公布2027年新的健康储蓄账户限额
zh.summary: 美国国税局宣布了将于2027年生效的健康储蓄账户提高的缴款限额。新限额为管理医疗保健支出和储蓄的纳税人提供了更大的灵活性。这些调整反映了通货膨胀和不断变化的医疗融资需求。

title: One of the hottest crypto products in the world is finally coming to the U.S.
summary: Kalshi and Coinbase have received CFTC approval to offer perpetual futures contracts to U.S. investors, marking a significant regulatory milestone. Perpetual futures are among the fastest-growing cryptocurrency trading instruments globally. The approval enables American investors to access leveraged crypto trading that was previously restricted domestically.
content: Kalshi and Coinbase have received permission from the Commodity Futures Trading Commission to bring perpetual futures to U.S.-based investors.

zh.title: 全球最热门的加密货币产品之一终于来到美国
zh.summary: Kalshi和Coinbase已获得美国商品期货交易委员会的批准，可向美国投资者提供永续期货合约，标志着一个重要的监管里程碑。永续期货是全球增长最快的加密货币交易工具之一。该批准使美国投资者能够获得之前在国内受限的杠杆加密交易。

title: Brent oil price posts biggest monthly loss in six years as market counts on a U.S.-Iran deal
summary: Brent crude oil recorded its largest monthly decline in six years as markets anticipate progress toward a U.S.-Iran nuclear deal. Oil prices fell Friday after President Trump indicated he would announce a final decision on the agreement. The price movement reflects investor expectations that a deal could normalize oil supplies.
content: Oil prices fell Friday after President Trump said he would meet in the White House Situation Room to make a final decision about a deal with Iran.

zh.title: 布伦特油价录得六年来最大月度跌幅，市场寄望美伊协议
zh.summary: 布伦特原油录得六年来最大月度跌幅，因市场预期美伊核协议可能取得进展。特朗普总统周五暗示将宣布对该协议的最终决定后，油价下跌。价格走势反映了投资者的预期，认为协议可能会正常化石油供应。

title: Dell stock skyrockets 32% for its best day ever as AI server revenue soars
summary: Dell Technologies' stock surged 32% for its best single trading day on record, driven by the company's strongest revenue growth since its 2018 public return. AI server revenue exploded 757% year-over-year, demonstrating Dell's dominant position in the growing AI infrastructure market. The results underscore robust demand for hardware supporting artificial intelligence deployment.
content: Dell reported its fastest pace of revenue growth since returning to the public market in 2018, with AI server revenue soaring 757% over last year.

zh.title: 戴尔股价飙升32%创历史最佳单日表现，AI服务器收入激增
zh.summary: 戴尔科技公司股价飙升32%，创下单日交易纪录最佳表现，由该公司自2018年公开回归以来最强劲的收入增长推动。AI服务器收入同比增长757%，展示了戴尔在快速增长的AI基础设施市场中的主导地位。这些结果强调了对支持人工智能部署硬件的强劲需求。

title: Universal rejects billionaire Bill Ackman's takeover bid
summary: Universal Music Group rejected billionaire investor Bill Ackman's takeover proposal, with leadership determining the bid fundamentally undervalued the business. The rejection of Pershing Square's offer marks a significant moment in recent attempts to acquire major music industry assets. The failed bid highlights the challenges in consolidating one of the entertainment industry's largest companies.
content: The music giant said Pershing Square's offer fundamentally undervalued the business.

zh.title: 环球音乐集团拒绝亿万富豪比尔·阿克曼的收购投标
zh.summary: 环球音乐集团拒绝了亿万富豪投资者比尔·阿克曼的收购提议，公司领导层认定该投标从根本上低估了业务价值。对潘兴广场投标的拒绝标志着近期收购音乐产业主要资产的重要时刻。此次失败的投标突出了整合娱乐产业最大公司之一的挑战。

title: Morgan Stanley says these 'dividend hopefuls' are poised to outperform if they initiate a payout
summary: Morgan Stanley identified several companies poised to become dividend payers and potentially outperform the market if they initiate dividend payments. The analysis suggests these "dividend hopefuls" represent compelling investment opportunities for income-focused investors.
content: Dividend stocks may help boost investor returns over time, and Morgan Stanley thinks a number of companies are in a position to begin paying them.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利表示这些"股息希望者"如果启动派息可能会跑赢大盘
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利确定了几家公司，如果启动派息，有望成为派息公司并可能跑赢市场。该分析表明这些"股息希望者"为注重收入的投资者提供了令人信服的投资机会。

title: The ‘Three A’s’ are keeping the economy afloat during Iran war. Is it enough to avoid recession?
summary: The article discusses how three factors are supporting the U.S. economy amid geopolitical tensions from the Iran war, though underlying fragility remains. Market strength masks potential vulnerabilities that could trigger a recession.
content: The U.S. economy may be more fragile than a raging bull market suggests.

zh.title: "三A"在伊朗战争期间支撑经济。这足以避免衰退吗？
zh.summary: 该文章讨论了三个因素如何在伊朗战争引发的地缘政治紧张局势中支撑美国经济，尽管潜在脆弱性仍然存在。市场强势掩盖了可能引发衰退的隐患。

title: Mercedes-Benz may be shut out of U.S. market under bill aimed at Chinese automaker ownership
summary: A proposed bill targeting Chinese automaker ownership could restrict Mercedes-Benz's U.S. market access, as its largest shareholder is BAIC, a Chinese state-owned company. Legislative exemptions may not protect the German automaker from the restrictions.
content: Mercedes-Benz's largest individual shareholder is BAIC, a Chinese state-owned automaker. Sources told CNBC that exemptions in the legislation would not apply.

zh.title: 针对中国汽车制造商所有权的法案可能将梅赛德斯-奔驰挡在美国市场之外
zh.summary: 一项针对中国汽车制造商所有权的提议法案可能会限制梅赛德斯-奔驰进入美国市场，因为其最大股东是中国国企北汽。立法豁免可能无法保护这家德国汽车制造商免受限制。

title: Wall Street rides high into June on hopes that the war will soon come to an end. Here's what's ahead
summary: Stock markets rally into June on optimism about a potential U.S.-Iran peace resolution, though significant economic risks remain ahead. Investors continue betting on geopolitical improvements while monitoring other headwinds.
content: The stock market continues to bet on some sort of resolution being found with Iran. But there is also no shortage of other risks heading into a new month.

zh.title: 华尔街怀着战争即将结束的希望进入六月，涨势强劲。以下是前景
zh.summary: 股市因对美伊和平解决的潜在性乐观而在六月反弹，尽管前方仍存在重大经济风险。投资者继续押注地缘政治改善，同时警惕其他逆风。

title: What the Blue Origin rocket explosion means for Amazon's satellite ambitions
summary: A Blue Origin rocket failure raises concerns about Amazon's Project Kuiper satellite internet ambitions, which depend on reliable launch capabilities. The incident highlights execution risks for major tech companies competing to build satellite constellations.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 蓝色起源火箭爆炸对亚马逊卫星野心的影响
zh.summary: 蓝色起源火箭失败引发了对亚马逊Project Kuiper卫星互联网计划的担忧，该计划依赖可靠的发射能力。这一事件凸显了主要科技公司竞相建立卫星星座所面临的执行风险。

title: Trump DOJ 'lawfare' fund temporarily blocked by judge as suit proceeds
summary: A federal judge has temporarily blocked the DOJ's $1.8 billion Anti-Weaponization Fund amid criticism that it could compensate Trump allies. Litigation continues over the department's practices and fund eligibility.
content: The DOJ has faced strong criticism for the creation of a $1.8 Anti-Weaponization Fund which could compensate allies of President Donald Trump.

zh.title: 特朗普司法部"法律战"基金被法官临时阻止
zh.summary: 联邦法官因批评该基金可能补偿特朗普盟友而临时阻止了司法部的18亿美元反武器化基金。诉讼继续进行，涉及该部门的做法和基金资格问题。

title: Tokens or humans? The new corporate trade-off
summary: Rising AI costs are forcing corporate leaders to choose between expanding AI investments and maintaining human workforce levels. This emerging trade-off represents an underappreciated market risk as companies grapple with technology expenses.
content: AI is costing far more than companies expected, forcing CFOs into a new trade-off between tokens and humans and posing a risk the market hasn't priced in.

zh.title: 代币还是人类？新的企业权衡
zh.summary: 不断上升的人工智能成本迫使企业领导人在扩大人工智能投资和维持人力资源水平之间做出选择。随着公司努力应对技术支出，这种新兴的权衡代表了一个被低估的市场风险。

title: Iran war cost: Average U.S. household paying $450 more on gas and energy
summary: The Iran conflict is driving energy prices higher, adding approximately $450 annually to average U.S. household bills for gas and energy. Consumers are depleting savings and increasing debt to manage the increased costs.
content: Higher energy costs can force consumers to raid their savings and lean more into debt to cover expenses.

zh.title: 伊朗战争成本：美国平均家庭在天然气和能源方面多支付450美元
zh.summary: 伊朗冲突推高了能源价格，每年给美国平均家庭的天然气和能源账单增加约450美元。消费者正在用尽储蓄并增加债务以应对增加的成本。

title: The company behind the White House’s UFC event says rivals ‘would kill’ for the opportunity. Critics say that’s a problem.
summary: A UFC event at the White House for America's 250th anniversary celebration offers unprecedented corporate visibility that organizers say rivals covet. Critics argue the prime placement represents inappropriate government favoritism.
content: As work crews put up a temporary arena on the White House grounds for a UFC event next month tied to America’s 250th anniversary, supporters and critics of the event are in agreement that its prime placement in front of an American icon is an unprecedented opportunity for a company.

zh.title: 白宫UFC赛事背后公司表示对手"求之若渴"。批评人士说这有问题。
zh.summary: 白宫美国250周年庆典上的UFC赛事提供了组织者称竞争对手渴望的前所未有的企业曝光机会。批评人士辩称，这一优先安排代表了不恰当的政府偏袒。

title: What’s next for investors after the AI rally supercharged stocks in May?
summary: Following May's AI-driven stock market rally, investors are considering their next moves and alternative investment opportunities like early SpaceX access. The article explores both growth catalysts and emerging risks for June.
content: Also: A way to invest in SpaceX before its IPO and advice from the Moneyist.

zh.title: 在人工智能行情推高五月股市后，投资者接下来会怎么做？
zh.summary: 经历了五月由人工智能驱动的股市上涨后，投资者正在考虑下一步举措和替代投资机会，比如早期进入SpaceX。该文章探讨了六月的增长催化剂和新兴风险。

title: As SpaceX IPO nears, traders think it's a near-certainty Musk becomes the first trillionaire
summary: Market traders believe SpaceX's anticipated IPO will likely propel Elon Musk to trillionaire status before 2027 based on expected record-breaking valuation. The milestone would mark an unprecedented achievement in individual wealth accumulation.
content: With buzz about a record-shattering IPO for SpaceX, traders are confident Elon Musk will advance to trillionaire status before 2027.

zh.title: 随着SpaceX IPO日益临近，交易员认为马斯克成为首位万亿富豪几乎是必然
zh.summary: 市场交易员相信，基于预期的创纪录估值，SpaceX即将推出的IPO很可能在2027年前将埃隆·马斯克推至万亿美元富豪地位。这一里程碑将标志着个人财富积累前所未有的成就。

title: Dell’s stunning 30% stock rally is giving a big boost to shares of other server makers
summary: Dell's 30% stock rally is boosting competing server makers as AI infrastructure demand drives sustained growth in computing hardware. The sector surge reflects how traditional computing remains essential to AI buildout efforts.
content: Dell’s blowout earnings report is highlighting how the AI buildout is also driving demand for old-school computing.

zh.title: 戴尔惊人的30%股票涨幅正在大幅推动其他服务器制造商的股价
zh.summary: 戴尔30%的股票涨幅正在推动竞争对手服务器制造商，因为人工智能基础设施需求推动了计算硬件的持续增长。该行业增长反映了传统计算在人工智能建设中仍然至关重要。

title: Oil prices tumble 20% in May — the biggest monthly drop since 2020. Here’s what’s next.
summary: Global oil prices fell over 20% in May, marking the largest monthly decline since 2020, driven by optimism about a U.S.-Iran peace agreement. The article examines the implications for energy markets as geopolitical tensions potentially ease.
content: Global oil prices tumbled over 20% in May on hopes for the U.S.-Iran peace deal.

zh.title: 油价在五月下跌20% — 自2020年以来最大的月度跌幅。接下来会发生什么
zh.summary: 全球油价在5月份下跌超过20%，创下自2020年以来最大的月度跌幅，这是由于对美国-伊朗和平协议的乐观情绪推动的。该文章分析了地缘政治紧张局势可能缓和时对能源市场的影响。

title: Dell's earnings blowout makes clear now is not the time to go against the AI grain
summary: Dell's exceptional earnings underscore the importance of investing in AI infrastructure and computing technology rather than avoiding the trend. The strong results reinforce market confidence in AI-driven growth as a dominant investment theme.
content: Don't fight the tape.

zh.title: 戴尔的收益爆发清楚地表明现在不是与人工智能潮流相悖的时候
zh.summary: 戴尔的杰出收益强调了投资人工智能基础设施和计算技术而不是回避这一趋势的重要性。强劲的业绩加强了市场对人工智能驱动增长作为主导投资主题的信心。

title: SentinelOne stock drops 6% as cyber firm trims headcount to boost AI investments
summary: Cybersecurity firm SentinelOne is cutting employees to redirect resources toward AI development after reporting disappointing quarterly guidance. The stock declined as markets reacted to reduced near-term revenue expectations.
content: SentinelOne reported earnings after the bell Thursday and issued lackluster guidance for the current quarter and full-year.

zh.title: 亚洲富人担心失去家族财富——但许多人仍没有继承计划,调查显示
zh.summary: 一份瑞银集团调查显示,虽然亚洲富裕家族优先考虑代代相传地保护财富,但许多家族仍然缺乏基本的继承计划。这一差距凸显了该地区家族财富管理的重大漏洞。

title: I’m setting up brokerage accounts for my grandkids in my daughter’s name. Is that wise — or am I asking for trouble?
summary: The article discusses considerations for setting up brokerage accounts for grandchildren in a parent's name, with investments in diversified equity funds including the S&P 500. It explores the potential risks and financial implications of this approach.
content: “The contributions are invested in mutual funds tracking the S&P 500, small-cap stocks and international equities.”

zh.title: 我在女儿的名义下为孙子女建立经纪账户。这样做明智吗——还是在自找麻烦?
zh.summary: 该文章讨论了以父母名义为孙子女建立经纪账户的注意事项,包括投资于多元化股票基金(包括标普500指数)。它探讨了这种方法的潜在风险和财务影响。

title: Michael Dell courted Trump early. His company has reaped rewards
summary: Michael Dell's early courtship of Trump has resulted in business rewards for his company, exemplifying how corporations are seeking favor with the president in his second term. The trend represents a departure from traditional big business philanthropy norms.
content: The dynamic is emblematic of how business is seeking to sow favor with the president in his second term, and has departed from the norms of big business philanthropy.

zh.title: 迈克尔·戴尔早期讨好特朗普。他的公司收获了回报
zh.summary: 迈克尔·戴尔早期讨好特朗普为他的公司带来了商业回报,说明了企业如何在总统第二任期内寻求总统的青睐。这一趋势代表了与传统大企业慈善规范的背离。

title: ‘I’m unsure of the best approach’: My father, 91, is in hospice care. He left his six children CDs. Can we cash out?
summary: The article addresses a family's question about liquidating CDs left by their 91-year-old father currently in hospice care, with a banker suggesting liquidation may be easier after his passing. It explores the financial and timing considerations around inherited certificates of deposit.
content: “His banker suggested that it might be easier after my father’s passing if we liquidate all of the CDs.”

zh.title: 我不确定最佳方法：我91岁的父亲正在接受临终关怀，他留给六个孩子CD。我们能提前支取吗？
zh.summary: 这篇文章讨论了一个家庭关于提取其91岁父亲留下的定期存单的问题，该父亲目前正在接受临终关怀。一位银行家建议在父亲去世后提取可能更容易。文章探讨了继承定期存单的财务和时间考虑因素。

title: My golf buddy dropped me when I didn’t make him my financial adviser. Be careful who you trust.
summary: The article warns about the risks of trusting a friend with financial management decisions, illustrating how personal relationships can blur professional boundaries. It emphasizes that friendliness is insufficient qualification for financial advisory roles.
content: “Friendliness alone is not a sufficient reason to trust someone with your finances.”

zh.title: 当我没有让高尔夫球友做我的财务顾问时，他就与我断绝了关系。要小心你信任的人。
zh.summary: 这篇文章警告了信任朋友进行财务管理决策的风险，说明个人关系如何会模糊专业界限。它强调友好不足以担任财务顾问的角色。

title: Costco issues a lukewarm quarter, but delivers on the metric that matters most
summary: Costco delivered a mixed quarter with results below expectations on some metrics while performing well on key indicators. The company demonstrated continued resilience in consumer spending despite economic headwinds.
content: It was not the best quarter, but far from bad.

zh.title: Costco发布平淡季度业绩，但在最关键指标上表现突出
zh.summary: Costco本季度成绩喜忧参半，部分指标表现不及预期，但在关键指标上表现良好。尽管面临经济逆风，公司在消费支出方面仍展现了持续的韧性。

title: Dell stock soars toward another record high as the AI boom drives a big earnings beat
summary: Dell posted a massive earnings beat with AI-server revenue surging 757% year-over-year, marking the company's strongest profit performance in at least five years. The results underscore Dell's strategic positioning to capitalize on accelerating AI infrastructure demand.
content: The company’s AI-server revenue was up 757% in the first quarter, while profit beat expectations by the widest margin in at least five years.

zh.title: 受AI热潮驱动，戴尔股价再创历史新高，业绩大幅超预期
zh.summary: 戴尔公布了大幅超预期的业绩，AI服务器收入同比激增757%，这是公司至少五年来最强劲的盈利表现。这些成果凸显了戴尔战略性定位以抓住加速的AI基础设施需求的能力。

title: Okta shares rise on earnings beat and AI-agent opportunity
summary: Okta exceeded earnings expectations in its first quarter and identified a significant emerging market opportunity in AI-agent identity management. The company's positive outlook reflects growing demand for security solutions as enterprises deploy AI agents at scale.
content: Okta’s first-qarter earnings cleared Wall Street’s expectations, and the company believes a massive market for AI-agent identity management is brewing on the horizon.

zh.title: Okta因业绩超预期和AI代理机遇而股价上涨
zh.summary: Okta在第一季度超额完成收益预期，并在AI代理身份管理领域发现了显著的新兴市场机会。公司积极的前景反映了随着企业大规模部署AI代理，对安全解决方案需求的增长。

title: Asia markets rise as investors weigh Iran military activity against signs of temporary U.S.-Iran deal
summary: Asian stock markets advanced as investors balanced concerns about escalating Iran military activity with hopes for a temporary U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement. The positive sentiment signals growing confidence that diplomatic solutions may prevent further geopolitical disruption.
content: Asia-Pacific markets rose as investors shrugged off renewed Iran tensions against ceasefire optimism.

zh.title: 亚洲市场上升，投资者权衡伊朗军事活动与美伊临时协议迹象
zh.summary: 亚洲股市上涨，投资者在对伊朗军事活动升级的担忧与对美伊临时停火协议的希望之间寻求平衡。积极情绪表明投资者越来越相信外交解决方案可能会阻止进一步的地缘政治混乱。

title: Tesla Robotaxi fleet in Texas less than one-tenth size of Waymo's, filings reveal
summary: Tesla's registered autonomous vehicle fleet in Texas consists of just 42 vehicles, significantly smaller than competitor Waymo's operations in the state. The disparity highlights Tesla's slower deployment of its Robotaxi service despite long-standing promises.
content: Tesla has registered 42 automated vehicles in its driverless Robotaxi service in Texas, putting it far behind Waymo in the state.

zh.title: 文件显示特斯拉在德州的机器人出租车车队规模不到Waymo的十分之一
zh.summary: 特斯拉在德州注册的自动驾驶车队仅包含42辆车，远小于竞争对手Waymo在该州的运营规模。这种差异凸显了特斯拉在长期承诺的机器人出租车服务部署中进展缓慢。

title: Stock futures are little changed as traders eye developments in Middle East: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock markets hit fresh closing highs, driven by strength in the technology sector as traders balanced Middle East geopolitical developments. The broad market gains reflect continued investor confidence despite ongoing international tensions.
content: Boosted by a rally in the tech sector, all three major averages rose to fresh closing highs on Thursday.

zh.title: 股指期货小幅变动，交易员关注中东发展：实时更新
zh.summary: 美国股市创历史收盘新高，由科技板块强势推动，交易员平衡中东地缘政治发展。广泛的市场涨幅反映了投资者尽管面临持续国际紧张局势仍保持信心。
